steps.title: Spot the key finding
steps.content: The strongest signal is the archaeological evidence: clam size and abundance increased significantly at the time Kwakwaka'wakw people implemented the terraced garden method, proving the practice worked.

steps.title: Match the finding to the conclusion
steps.content:
The correct response directly states the practice “effectively maintained a food source” and “promoted its robustness” — exactly what the increases in clam size and abundance demonstrate.

The other choices either introduce unsupported ideas about non-Indigenous adoption, draw unfounded comparisons across cultural groups or address contemporary practices the passage never mentions.

That confirms B is correct.
